Name: -1_good_taste_person_think
Representative_Docs: ['When I think of someone who has good taste, I think of someone who is trendy, and most people would admire them for their good taste.  I think they would take pride in thier appearance and their surroundings.  They just look good overall.  Trendsetters.', 'When I say they have good taste, it usually means that they tends to appreciate subtle details in the object. For example, a person that have a good taste in fashion would dress in a way that elevate their body features and while the fabric/pattern/fit might be eccentric and different then, it would still go together. ', 'To mean it means that the someone being referred to makes or usually for the most part things which are very good in terms of quality or appearance.  In reality though it effectively usually means that the person who is being referred to makes choices usually aligned with mine.  A person who has good taste may also be someone who consistently chooses things which are just generally popular overall.']

They have good taste and they like things that most and I like so they have good taste.', 'When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.']

Name: 1_like_things_art_good
